forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 50. Northwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. North northwest wind 3 to 8 mph.

weather_report:
In the tranquil hours of this March night, Downtown San Francisco breathes calmness as the skies remain mostly clear, ushering in a serene low around 50 degrees. A gentle northwest wind whispers softly, creating a refreshing ambiance. As dawn approaches, the promise of a sunny Wednesday unfolds, anticipating a daytime high near 70, lending warmth without demanding the heaviness of summer attire. While temperatures may retreat slightly in the afternoon, they will retain a pleasant allure, supported by a soft, north-northwest breeze.

As the sun ascends, the city reveals itself without the veil of fog that often cloaks its iconic skyline. Today’s clarity invites eager souls to wander the streets—perhaps meandering through local art galleries or enjoying the artistry of cafes that dot the sidewalks. Light layers, perhaps a simple cardigan or a light jacket, will suffice for this gentle day. Whether it’s slipping into a cozy chair with a book or joining friends for an outdoor coffee, the conditions favor moments of quiet reflection or delightful companionship. A perfect day to embrace the beauty that San Francisco has to offer, without the chill of the marine layer dampening the spirit.
